gplates.name: GPlates Web Service
gplates.citation: Muller, R. D. et al. (2019), A global plate model including lithospheric deformation along major rifts and orogens since the Triassic. Tectonics, 38. https://doi.org/10.1029/2018TC005462

localScenario.name: Earth Console local scenario vectors
localScenario.note: Illustrative future drift vectors, not a validated scientific forecast.

transformations: Country tracks use Natural Earth label points
Past positions are reconstructed with GPlates Web Service
Future positions use local scenario vectors
